# Filter Fields Extraction Report

This report summarizes the filter field values extracted from queries across connectors, content items, and ASIM parsers.

## Summary

| Source Type | Total Items | With Filter Fields | Percentage |
|-------------|-------------|-------------------|------------|
| Connectors | 640 | 196 | 30.6% |
| Content Items | 6755 | 2520 | 37.3% |
| ASIM Parsers | 216 | 121 | 56.0% |

## Filter Field Format

Filter fields are stored in the format:
```
table.field operator "value(s)" | table.field operator "value" | ...
```

Supported operators:
- Equality: `==`, `=~` (case-insensitive), `!=`
- Set membership: `in`, `in~` (case-insensitive), `!in`, `!in~`
- String matching: `has`, `has_cs`, `contains`, `contains_cs`, `startswith`, `startswith_cs`, `endswith`, `endswith_cs`
- Multi-value string: `has_any`, `has_all`
- Negative string: `!has`, `!contains`, `!startswith`, `!endswith`
- Regex: `matches regex`

Multiple values for in/has_any/has_all operators are comma-separated inside the quotes.

## Fields Extracted

The following fields are extracted from queries:

| Field | Typical Table | Purpose |
|-------|---------------|--------|
| DeviceVendor | CommonSecurityLog | CEF source vendor |
| DeviceProduct | CommonSecurityLog | CEF source product |
| EventVendor | ASIM tables | Normalized source vendor |
| EventProduct | ASIM tables | Normalized source product |
| ResourceType | AzureDiagnostics | Azure resource type |
| Category | AzureDiagnostics | Log category |
| EventID | WindowsEvent/SecurityEvent/Event | Windows event identifier |
| Source | Event | Event log source (e.g., Service Control Manager) |
| Provider | WindowsEvent | Windows event provider |
| Facility | Syslog | Syslog facility (e.g., auth, authpriv, cron) |
| ProcessName | Syslog | Process that generated the log |
| ProcessID | Syslog | Process ID |
| SyslogMessage | Syslog | Message content (uses string operators: has, contains, etc.) |

---

| hunting_query | Network footprint (3) | DeviceFileEvents.FileOriginReferrerUrl contains "URL GOES HERE"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.FileOriginUrl == "IP ADDRESS GOES HERE"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.FileOriginUrl contains "URL GOES HERE" | Microsoft 365 Defender/General queries/Network footprint (3).yaml |
| hunting_query | Network info of machine | DeviceNetworkInfo.NetworkAdapterStatus == "Up" | Microsoft 365 Defender/General queries/Network info of machine.yaml |
| hunting_query | New Location Sign in with Mail forwarding activity | OfficeActivity.Parameters contains "ForwardTo"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters contains "ForwardingSmtpAddress"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters contains "RedirectTo"  \|  _Computed.Operation in~ "New-InboxRule,Set-InboxRule,Set-Mailbox" | MultipleDataSources/MailForwardingActivityFromNewLocation.yaml |
| hunting_query | New TABL Items | CloudAppEvents.ActionType == "New-TenantAllowBlockListItems" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Email and Collaboration Queries/General/New TABL Items.yaml |
| hunting_query | New users calling sensitive Watchlist | LAQueryLogs.QueryText has_any "_GetWatchlist(" | LAQueryLogs/NewUserCallingSensitiveWatchlist.yaml |
| hunting_query | NewAppOrServicePrincipalCredential[Nobelium] | CloudAppEvents.ActionType in "Add service principal credentials.,Add service principal.,Update application  Certificates and secrets management"  \|  _Computed.ActorDetails has "@"  \|  _Computed.keyEvents has "KeyIdentifier="  \|  _Computed.keyEvents has "KeyUsage=Verify" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Persistence/NewAppOrServicePrincipalCredential[Nobelium].yaml |
| hunting_query | Nishang Reverse TCP Shell in Base64 (Normalized Pr | _Computed.FinalString contains "$"  \|  _Computed.FinalString contains "iex"  \|  _Computed.FinalString contains "invoke"  \|  _Computed.FinalString has "tcpclient" | ASimProcess/imProcess_NishangReverseTCPShellBase64.yaml |
| hunting_query | Non-local logons with -500 account | DeviceLogonEvents.AccountSid endswith "-500" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Lateral Movement/Non-local logons with -500 account.yaml |
| hunting_query | NotOnboarded Devices by DeviceName Prefix | DeviceInfo.OnboardingStatus != "Onboarded" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Device Inventory/NotOnboarded Devices by DeviceName Prefix.yaml |
| hunting_query | NotOnboarded Devices by DeviceName Suffix | DeviceInfo.OnboardingStatus != "Onboarded" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Device Inventory/NotOnboarded Devices by DeviceName Suffix.yaml |
| hunting_query | Number of unique accounts performing Teams message | CloudAppEvents.ActionType == "AdminSubmissionSubmitted"  \|  _Computed.SubmissionContentType == "ChatMessage"  \|  _Computed.SubmissionType in "1,2,3" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Email and Collaboration Queries/Microsoft Teams protection/Number of unique accounts performing Teams message Admin submissions.yaml |
| hunting_query | Number of unique accounts performing Teams message | CloudAppEvents.ActionType == "UserSubmission"  \|  _Computed.SubmissionContentType == "ChatMessage" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Email and Collaboration Queries/Microsoft Teams protection/Number of unique accounts performing Teams message User  submissions.yaml |
| hunting_query | OAuth Application Required Resource Access Update | AuditLogs.ActivityDisplayName has_any "Update application"  \|  _Computed.ModifiedPropertyName =~ "RequiredResourceAccess" | AuditLogs/AppRequiredResourceAccessUpdate.yaml |
| hunting_query | OAuth Apps accessing user mail via GraphAPI [Nobel | CloudAppEvents.ActionType == "MailItemsAccessed"  \|  CloudAppEvents.RawEventData has "00000003-0000-0000-c000-000000000000"  \|  CloudAppEvents.RawEventData has "ClientAppId"  \|  _Computed.AppId == "00000003-0000-0000-c000-000000000000" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Exfiltration/OAuth Apps accessing user mail via GraphAPI [Nobelium].yaml |

| hunting_query | Open email link | AlertInfo.ActionType == "BrowserLaunchedToOpenUrl" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Delivery/Open email link.yaml |
| hunting_query | PSExec Attrib commands | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine has ".bat"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessParentFileName endswith "PSEXESVC.exe" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Campaigns/Macaw Ransomware/PSExec Attrib commands.yaml |
| hunting_query | PUA ThreatName per Computer | DeviceEvents.ActionType == "AntivirusDetection" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Protection events/PUA ThreatName per Computer.yaml |
| hunting_query | Password Protected Archive Creation | _Computed.SplitLaunchString startswith "-p" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Exfiltration/Password Protected Archive Creation.yaml |
| hunting_query | PasswordSearch | IdentityQueryEvents.ActionType == "LDAP query" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Discovery/PasswordSearch.yaml |

| hunting_query | Phish Detections (High) by delivery location | EmailEvents.ConfidenceLevel has_any "Phish"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "Phishing simulation"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "SecOps Mailbox" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Email and Collaboration Queries/Phish/Phish Detections by Delivery Location - High.yaml |
| hunting_query | Phish Detections (Normal) by delivery location | EmailEvents.ConfidenceLevel has_any "Phish"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "Phishing simulation"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "SecOps Mailbox" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Email and Collaboration Queries/Phish/Phish Detections by Delivery Location - Medium.yaml |
| hunting_query | Phish Detections Trend | EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "Phishing simulation"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "SecOps Mailbox"  \|  EmailEvents.ThreatTypes has "Phish" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Email and Collaboration Queries/Phish/Phish Detection Trend.yaml |
| hunting_query | Phish Detections by Detection technology | EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "Phishing simulation"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "SecOps Mailbox"  \|  EmailEvents.ThreatTypes has "Phish" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Email and Collaboration Queries/Phish/Phish Detections by Detection Technology.yaml |
| hunting_query | Phish Detections by delivery location trend | EmailEvents.DeliveryLocation in "Dropped,Failed,Inbox/folder,Junk folder,Quarantine"  \|  EmailEvents.DetectionMethods has "Phish"  \|  EmailEvents.EmailDirection == "Inbound"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "Phishing simulation"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "SecOps Mailbox" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Email and Collaboration Queries/Phish/Phish Detections by Delivery Location Trend.yaml |
| hunting_query | Pivot from detections to related downloads | DeviceFileEvents.ActionType == "AntivirusDetection" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Delivery/Pivot from detections to related downloads.yaml |
| hunting_query | Policy configuration changes for CloudApp Events | CloudAppEvents.ActionType in "Add owner to policy.,Add policy to service principal.,Add policy.,Delete policy.,Remove-CrossTenantAccessPolicy,Remove-LabelPolicy,Update authorization policy.,Update policy.,Write PolicyAssignments,Write PolicyExemptions" | CloudAppEvents/SetPolicyConfigInCloudAppEvents.yaml |
| hunting_query | Possible File Copy to USB Drive | DeviceFileEvents.ActionType == "PnpDeviceConnected" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Exfiltration/Possible File Copy to USB Drive.yaml |
| hunting_query | Possible Ransomware Related Destruction Activity | DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains "/grant Everyone:F"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains "/w"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "/all"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "/change"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "/d"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "/disable"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "/quiet"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "delete shadows"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "deletejournal"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy delete"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "usn" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Execution/Possible Ransomware Related Destruction Activity.yaml |
| hunting_query | Possible SpringShell Exploitation Attempt (CVE-202 | AzureDiagnostics.Category in "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog,ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog,FrontdoorAccessLog,FrontdoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"  \|  _Computed.httpMethod_s =~ "POST" | AzureDiagnostics/SpringShellExploitationAttempt.yaml |

| hunting_query | Possible command injection attempts against Azure  | _Computed.NewProcessName =~ "cmd.exe"  \|  _Computed.ParentProcessName endswith "RSPortal.exe"  \|  _Computed.ParentProcessName endswith "ReportingServicesService.exe"  \|  _Computed.ParentProcessName endswith "RsPowerBI.exe"  \|  _Computed.ParentProcessName endswith "diawp.exe"  \|  _Computed.ParentProcessName endswith "taskexecutor.exe" | MultipleDataSources/PossibleCommandInjectionagainstAzureIR.yaml |
| hunting_query | Possible partner impersonation in external Team me | MessageEvents.IsExternalThread == "1"  \|  MessageEvents.IsOwnedThread == "0"  \|  MessageEvents.SenderDisplayName contains "@contoso.com" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Email and Collaboration Queries/Microsoft Teams protection/Possible partner impersonation in external Team messages.yaml |
| hunting_query | Potential Local Exploitation for Privilege Escalat | Event.EventID == "1"  \|  Event.EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" | SecurityEvent/PotentialLocalExploitationForPrivilegeEscalation.yaml |
| hunting_query | Potential Process Doppelganging | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4985" | SecurityEvent/PotentialProcessDoppelganging.yaml |

| hunting_query | detect-suspicious-commands-initiated-by-web-server | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName in "beasvc.exe,httpd.exe,w3wp.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName startswith "tomcat"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessParentFileName in "beasvc.exe,httpd.exe,w3wp.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessParentFileName startswith "tomcat"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains "%temp%"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "certutil"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "ipconfig"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "ping"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "systeminfo"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "timeout"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "wget"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "whoami" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Discovery/detect-suspicious-commands-initiated-by-web-server-processes.yaml |

| hunting_query | detect-uac-elevation | DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessTokenElevation == "TokenElevationTypeFull" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Execution/detect-uac-elevation.yml |
| hunting_query | detect-web-server-exploit-doublepulsar | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine contains "//confluence"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName == "beasvc.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessParentFileName == "beasvc.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine !contains "ApplicationNo"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine !contains "Cosmos"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine !contains "CustomerGroup"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine !contains "Unrestricted"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine !startswith "POWERSHELL.EXE  -C \"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains "$"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains "-e"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains "-split"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains ">"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains "@echo"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains "encodedcommand"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains "wget" | Microsoft 365 Defender/Execution/detect-web-server-exploit-doublepulsar.yaml |

\|  AzureActivity.ActivityStatusValue has_any "Succeeded"  \|  AzureActivity.ActivitySubstatusValue in~ "Created,OK"  \|  AzureActivity.CategoryValue == "Security"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationName in "Add application,Add conditional access policy,Delete conditional access policy,Invite external user,Redeem external user invite,Update application – Certificates and secrets management,Update conditional access policy"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationName in~ "Add service principal,Add user,Admin deleted security info,Admin registered security info,Admin updated security info,Register \|  AzureActivity.OperationNameValue in | workbook | ExchangeCompromiseHunting | DeviceInfo.ActionType =~ "FileCreated"  \|  DeviceNetworkEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName has_any "umworkerprocess.exe"  \|  DeviceNetworkEvents.InitiatingProcessSHA256 == "256"  \|  Event.EventLog =~ "Application"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription !contains "System.OutOfMemoryException"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription contains "MSExchange Unified Messaging"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription contains "TextFormattingRunProperties"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription contains "umworkerprocess"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription startswith "An unhandled exception occurred in a UM worker process"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription startswith "The Microsoft Exchange Unified Messaging service"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription startswith "Watson report"  \|  Event.Source == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon"  \|  Event.Source startswith "MSExchange"  \|  SecurityEvent.AccessMask in "0x10,0x100,0x2,0x4"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine contains "-e"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine has "$client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine has "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/besimorhino/powercat/master/powercat.ps1"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID in "3,4663,4688,5136"  \|  SecurityEvent.ParentProcessName has_any "umworkerprocess.exe"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process in "powershell.exe,powershell_ise.exe"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process has_any "cmd.exe"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process has_any "powershell.exe"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process has_any "umworkerprocess.exe"  \|  W3CIISLog.cIP !startswith "10."  \|  W3CIISLog.cIP !startswith "127."  \|  W3CIISLog.cIP !startswith "172."  \|  W3CIISLog.cIP !startswith "::"  \|  W3CIISLog.cIP !startswith "fe80"  \|  W3CIISLog.csUriQuery startswith "t="  \|  W3CIISLog.csUriStem =~ "/ews/exchange.asmx"  \|  _Computed.FileHash == "256"  \|  _Computed.FinalString contains "$"  \|  _Computed.FinalString contains "iex"  \|  _Computed.FinalString contains "invoke"  \|  _Computed.FinalString has "tcpclient"  \|  _Computed.result != "2" | ExchangeCompromiseHunting.json |

| hunting_query | AWS Security Hub - IAM users with console password | AWSSecurityHubFindings.AwsSecurityFindingGeneratorId == "security-control/IAM.5"  \|  AWSSecurityHubFindings.ComplianceSecurityControlId == "IAM.5"  \|  AWSSecurityHubFindings.ComplianceStatus == "FAILED"  \|  AWSSecurityHubFindings.RecordState == "ACTIVE" | [IAMUserMFADisabled.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/AWS%20Security%20Hub/Hunting%20Queries/IAMUserMFADisabled.yaml) |
| workbook | AWSSecurityHubComplianceWorkbook | AWSSecurityHubFindings.ComplianceStatus in "FAILED,PASSED"  \|  AWSSecurityHubFindings.RecordState == "ACTIVE"  \|  _Computed.SecurityControlId startswith "EC2."  \|  _Computed.SecurityControlId startswith "IAM."  \|  _Computed.SeverityLabel in "CRITICAL,HIGH,LOW,MEDIUM"  \|  _Computed.Standard contains "CIS"  \|  _Computed.Standard contains "HIPAA"  \|  _Computed.Standard contains "ISO"  \|  _Computed.Standard contains "NIST"  \|  _Computed.Standard contains "PCI"  \|  _Computed.Standard contains "SOC" | [AWSSecurityHubComplianceWorkbook.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/AWS%20Security%20Hub/Workbooks/AWSSecurityHubComplianceWorkbook.json) |

| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - Privilege escalation via CRUD S3 p | AWSCloudTrail.EventName in "PutGroupPolicy,PutRolePolicy,PutUserPolicy"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "s3:Create"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "s3:Delete"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "s3:Get"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "s3:Put"  \|  _Computed.Effect =~ "Allow" | [AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaCRUDS3Policy.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaCRUDS3Policy.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - Privilege escalation via CloudForm | AWSCloudTrail.EventName in "PutGroupPolicy,PutRolePolicy,PutUserPolicy"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "cloudformation:Create*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "cloudformation:CreateStack"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "cloudformation:Describe*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "cloudformation:DescribeStacks"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "iam:*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "iam:PassRole"  \|  _Computed.Action has "cloudformation:*"  \|  _Computed.Action has "iam:*"  \|  _Computed.Action has "iam:PassRole"  \|  _Computed.Effect =~ "Allow" | [AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaCloudFormationPolicy.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaCloudFormationPolicy.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - Privilege escalation via DataPipel | AWSCloudTrail.EventName in "PutGroupPolicy,PutRolePolicy,PutUserPolicy"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "datapipeline:Activate*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "datapipeline:Create*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "datapipeline:Put*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "iam:*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "iam:PassRole"  \|  _Computed.Action has "datapipeline:*"  \|  _Computed.Action has "datapipeline:ActivatePipeline"  \|  _Computed.Action has "datapipeline:CreatePipeline"  \|  _Computed.Action has "datapipeline:PutPipelineDefinition"  \|  _Computed.Action has "iam:*"  \|  _Computed.Action has "iam:PassRole"  \|  _Computed.Effect =~ "Allow" | [AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaDataPipeline.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaDataPipeline.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - Privilege escalation via EC2 polic | AWSCloudTrail.EventName in "PutGroupPolicy,PutRolePolicy,PutUserPolicy"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "ec2:*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "ec2:List*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "ec2:ListInstances"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "ec2:Modify*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "ec2:ModifyInstanceAttribute"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "ec2:Run*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "ec2:RunInstances"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "ec2:Start*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "ec2:StartInstance"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "iam:*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "iam:PassRole"  \|  _Computed.Effect =~ "Allow" | [AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaEC2Policy.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaEC2Policy.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - Privilege escalation via Glue poli | AWSCloudTrail.EventName in "PutGroupPolicy,PutRolePolicy,PutUserPolicy"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "glue:*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "glue:Create*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "glue:CreateDevEndpoint"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "glue:Get*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "glue:GetDevEndpoints"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "glue:Update*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "glue:UpdateDevEndpoint"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "iam:*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "iam:PassRole"  \|  _Computed.Effect =~ "Allow" | [AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaGluePolicy.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaGluePolicy.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - Privilege escalation via Lambda po | AWSCloudTrail.EventName in "PutGroupPolicy,PutRolePolicy,PutUserPolicy"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "dynamodb:*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "dynamodb:Create*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "dynamodb:CreateTable"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "dynamodb:Put*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "dynamodb:PutItem"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "iam:*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "iam:PassRole"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "lambda:*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "lambda:Create*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "lambda:CreateEventSourceMapping"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "lambda:CreateFunction"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "lambda:Invoke*"  \|  _Computed.Action contains "lambda:InvokeFunction"  \|  _Computed.Effect =~ "Allow" | [AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaLambdaPolicy.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_PrivilegeEscalationViaLambdaPolicy.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - S3 Object Exfiltration from Anonym | AWSCloudTrail.EventName == "GetObject"  \|  AWSCloudTrail.UserIdentityPrincipalid == "Anonymous" | [AWS_S3ObjectExfiltrationByAnonymousUser.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_S3ObjectExfiltrationByAnonymousUser.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - S3 bucket access point publicly ex | AWSCloudTrail.EventName == "PutAccessPointPolicy"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@"  \|  _Computed.Effect =~ "Allow"  \|  _Computed.Principal == "*"  \|  _Computed.Principal_aws == "*" | [AWS_S3BucketAccessPointExposed.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_S3BucketAccessPointExposed.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - S3 bucket exposed via ACL | AWSCloudTrail.EventName == "PutBucketAcl"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@"  \|  _Computed.URI endswith "AllUsers"  \|  _Computed.URI endswith "AuthenticatedUsers"  \|  _Computed.type == "Group"  \|  _Computed.xamzacl in "authenticated-read,public-read,public-read-write" | [AWS_S3BucketExposedviaACL.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_S3BucketExposedviaACL.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - S3 bucket exposed via policy | AWSCloudTrail.EventName == "PutBucketPolicy"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@"  \|  _Computed.Effect =~ "Allow"  \|  _Computed.Principal == "*"  \|  _Computed.Principal_aws == "*" | [AWS_S3BucketExposedviaPolicy.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_S3BucketExposedviaPolicy.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - S3 bucket suspicious ransomware ac | AWSCloudTrail.EventName in "GetObject,PutObject"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@" | [AWS_S3Ransomware.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_S3Ransomware.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | AWSCloudTrail - S3 object publicly exposed | AWSCloudTrail.EventName == "PutObjectAcl"  \|  _Computed.AccountName contains "@"  \|  _Computed.URI endswith "AllUsers"  \|  _Computed.URI endswith "AuthenticatedUsers"  \|  _Computed.type == "Group"  \|  _Computed.xamzacl in "authenticated-read,public-read,public-read-write" | [AWS_S3ObjectPubliclyExposed.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Analytic%20Rules/AWS_S3ObjectPubliclyExposed.yaml) |

| hunting_query | AWSCloudTrail - IAM AccessDenied discovery events | AWSCloudTrail.ErrorMessage in "Access Denied,AccessDenied"  \|  AWSCloudTrail.UserAgent !endswith ".amazonaws.com"  \|  AWSCloudTrail.UserIdentityType == "IAMUser" | [AWS_IAMAccsesDeniedDiscoveryEvents.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Amazon%20Web%20Services/Hunting%20Queries/AWS_IAMAccsesDeniedDiscoveryEvents.yaml) |

### Apache Log4j Vulnerability Detection

| Type | Name | Filter Fields | File |
|------|------|---------------|------|
| analytic_rule | Azure WAF matching for Log4j vuln(CVE-2021-44228) | AzureDiagnostics.Category in "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog,FrontdoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.NETWORK" | [AzureWAFmatching_log4j_vuln.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Analytic%20Rules/AzureWAFmatching_log4j_vuln.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Log4j vulnerability exploit aka Log4Shell IP IOC | AzureDiagnostics.Category in "AzureFirewallApplicationRule,AzureFirewallNetworkRule"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.ResourceType =~ "AZUREFIREWALLS"  \|  DeviceNetworkEvents.ActionType =~ "InboundConnectionAccepted"  \|  Event.EventID == "3"  \|  Event.Source =~ "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" | [Log4J_IPIOC_Dec112021.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Analytic%20Rules/Log4J_IPIOC_Dec112021.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Azure WAF Log4j CVE-2021-44228 hunting | AzureDiagnostics.Category in~ "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog,ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog,FrontdoorAccessLog,FrontdoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"  \|  _Computed.CmdLine has_any "wget" | [WAF_log4j_vulnerability.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Hunting%20Queries/WAF_log4j_vulnerability.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Linux security related process termination activit | Syslog.Facility == "user"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "AUOMS_EXECVE"  \|  _Computed.cmdline !has "/omsagent/plugin/pi"  \|  _Computed.cmdline !has "/omsconfig/modules"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has_any "omsagent"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has_any "service apparmor stop" | [Process_Termination_Activity.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Hunting%20Queries/Process_Termination_Activity.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Network Connection to New External LDAP Server | CommonSecurityLog.ApplicationProtocol =~ "ldap"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceAction has_any "allow" | [NetworkConnectionToNewExternalLDAPServer.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Hunting%20Queries/NetworkConnectionToNewExternalLDAPServer.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Possible Container Miner related artifacts detecte | Syslog.Facility == "user"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "AUOMS_EXECVE"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has "docker kill"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has_any "gakeaws"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has_any "monero-miner" | [Container_Miner_Activity.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Hunting%20Queries/Container_Miner_Activity.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Possible Linux attack toolkit detected via Syslog  | Syslog.Facility == "user"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "AUOMS_EXECVE"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has "JNDI-Injection-Exploit"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has "LogMePwn"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has "git clone"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has "log4j-payload-generator" | [Linux_Toolkit_Detected.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Hunting%20Queries/Linux_Toolkit_Detected.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Possible exploitation of Apache log4j component de | Syslog.SyslogMessage has "AUOMS_EXECVE"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "jndi"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has_any "corba,dns,iiop,ldap,nds,nis,rmi" | [Apache_log4j_Vulnerability.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Hunting%20Queries/Apache_log4j_Vulnerability.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Suspicious Base64 download activity detected | Syslog.Facility == "user"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "AUOMS_EXECVE"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has "/Basic/Command/Base64/" | [Base64_Download_Activity.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Hunting%20Queries/Base64_Download_Activity.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Suspicious Shell script detected | Syslog.Facility == "user"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "AUOMS_EXECVE"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has "curl"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has "wget"  \|  _Computed.cmdline matchesregex "[0-9]{1,3}\\.[0-9]{1,3}\\.[0-9]{1,3}\\.[0-9]{1,3}" | [Suspicious_ShellScript_Activity.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Hunting%20Queries/Suspicious_ShellScript_Activity.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Suspicious manipulation of firewall detected via S | Syslog.Facility == "user"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "AUOMS_EXECVE"  \|  _Computed.cmdline has_any "SuSEfirewall2 stop" | [Firewall_Disable_Activity.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Hunting%20Queries/Firewall_Disable_Activity.yaml) |
| workbook | Log4jImpactAssessment | _Computed.CVEs has "CVE-2021-44228"  \|  _Computed.CVEs has "CVE-2021-45046"  \|  _Computed.CVEs has "CVE-2021-45105"  \|  _Computed.assessmentKey in "1195afff-c881-495e-9bc5-1486211ae03f,dbd0cb49-b563-45e7-9724-889e799fa648"  \|  _Computed.maxscore != "0" | [Log4jImpactAssessment.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Workbooks/Log4jImpactAssessment.json) |
| workbook | Log4jPostCompromiseHunting | AzureDiagnostics.Category in "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog,ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog,FrontdoorAccessLog,FrontdoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"  \|  Syslog.Facility == "user"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "AUOMS_EXECVE"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "jndi"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has_any "corba,dns,iiop,ldap,nds,nis,rmi"  \|  _Computed.CmdLine has_any "wget" | [Log4jPostCompromiseHunting.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Apache%20Log4j%20Vulnerability%20Detection/Workbooks/Log4jPostCompromiseHunting.json) |

| hunting_query | Azure VM Run Command executed from Azure IP addres | AzureActivity.Authorization has "virtualMachines"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationNameValue == "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/runCommand/action" | [AzureRunCommandFromAzureIP.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Azure%20Activity/Hunting%20Queries/AzureRunCommandFromAzureIP.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Azure Virtual Network Subnets Administrative Opera | AzureActivity.ActivitySubstatusValue in~ "Accepted,Created"  \|  AzureActivity.CategoryValue =~ "Administrative" | [AzureVirtualNetworkSubnets_AdministrativeOperationset.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Azure%20Activity/Hunting%20Queries/AzureVirtualNetworkSubnets_AdministrativeOperationset.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Azure storage key enumeration | AzureActivity.ActivityStatusValue =~ "Succeeded"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationNameValue =~ "microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/listkeys/action" | [Anomalous_Listing_Of_Storage_Keys.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Azure%20Activity/Hunting%20Queries/Anomalous_Listing_Of_Storage_Keys.yaml) |
| hunting_query | AzureActivity Administration From VPS Providers | AzureActivity.CategoryValue =~ "Administrative" | [AzureAdministrationFromVPS.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Azure%20Activity/Hunting%20Queries/AzureAdministrationFromVPS.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Common deployed resources | AzureActivity.ActivityStatusValue =~ "Succeeded" | [Common_Deployed_Resources.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Azure%20Activity/Hunting%20Queries/Common_Deployed_Resources.yaml) |

| hunting_query | User detection added to privilege groups based in  | AuditLogs.ActivityDisplayName has_any "Add eligible member to role"  \|  AuditLogs.LoggedByService in "Core Directory,PIM"  \|  _Computed.newValue contains "ApplicationAdministrators"  \|  _Computed.newValue contains "BuiltInRole"  \|  _Computed.newValue contains "User Administrator"  \|  _Computed.newValue contains "UserAccountAdmins" | [UserDetectPrivilegeGroup.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Business%20Email%20Compromise%20-%20Financial%20Fraud/Hunting%20Queries/UserDetectPrivilegeGroup.yaml) |

| hunting_query | Cisco SEG - Failed outgoing TLS connections | _Computed.tls_status =~ "Failure" | [CiscoSEGFailedTLSOut.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/CiscoSEG/Hunting%20Queries/CiscoSEGFailedTLSOut.yaml) |

### Cyborg Security HUNTER

| Type | Name | Filter Fields | File |
|------|------|---------------|------|
| hunting_query | Attempted VBScript Stored in Non-Run CurrentVersio | SecurityEvent.NewValue contains "CreateObject"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewValue contains "Execute("  \|  SecurityEvent.NewValue contains "RegRead"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewValue contains "RunHTMLApplication"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewValue contains "jscript"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewValue contains "mshtml"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewValue contains "mshtml,"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewValue contains "vbscript"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewValue contains "window.close"  \|  SecurityEvent.ObjectName !has "\\Run"  \|  SecurityEvent.ObjectName has "\\CurrentVersion" | [Attempted VBScript Stored in Non-Run CurrentVersion Registry Key Value.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Cyborg%20Security%20HUNTER/Hunting%20Queries/Attempted%20VBScript%20Stored%20in%20Non-Run%20CurrentVersion%20Registry%20Key%20Value.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Excessive Windows Discovery and Execution Processe | SecurityEvent.NewProcessName has_any "arp.exe" | [Excessive Windows Discovery and Execution Processes - Potential Malware Installation.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Cyborg%20Security%20HUNTER/Hunting%20Queries/Excessive%20Windows%20Discovery%20and%20Execution%20Processes%20-%20Potential%20Malware%20Installation.yaml) |
| hunting_query | LSASS Memory Dumping using WerFault.exe - Command  | SecurityEvent.NewProcessName endswith "werfault.exe"  \|  SecurityEvent.ObjectName endswith "lsass.exe" | [LSASS Memory Dumping using WerFault.exe - Command Identification.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Cyborg%20Security%20HUNTER/Hunting%20Queries/LSASS%20Memory%20Dumping%20using%20WerFault.exe%20-%20Command%20Identification.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Metasploit / Impacket PsExec Process Creation Acti | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewProcessName matchesregex "C:\\\\Windows\\\\[a-zA-Z]{8}.exe"  \|  SecurityEvent.ParentProcessName has "services.exe" | [Metasploit Impacket PsExec Process Creation Activity.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Cyborg%20Security%20HUNTER/Hunting%20Queries/Metasploit%20Impacket%20PsExec%20Process%20Creation%20Activity.yaml) |
| hunting_query | PowerShell Pastebin Download | SecurityEvent.CommandLine contains ".onion"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine contains "http"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine contains "paste."  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine has_any "pastebin"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process has "powershell.exe" | [PowerShell Pastebin Download.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Cyborg%20Security%20HUNTER/Hunting%20Queries/PowerShell%20Pastebin%20Download.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Powershell Encoded Command Execution | SecurityEvent.CommandLine matchesregex "-[Ee^]{1,2}[NnCcOoDdEeMmAaPpHh^`]+\\s+\"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewProcessName endswith "powershell.exe" | [Powershell Encoded Command Execution.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Cyborg%20Security%20HUNTER/Hunting%20Queries/Powershell%20Encoded%20Command%20Execution.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Prohibited Applications Spawning cmd.exe or powers | SecurityEvent.NewProcessName has_any "cmd.exe"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewProcessName has_any "winword.exe" | [Prohibited Applications Spawning cmd.exe or powershell.exe.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Cyborg%20Security%20HUNTER/Hunting%20Queries/Prohibited%20Applications%20Spawning%20cmd.exe%20or%20powershell.exe.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Proxy VBScript Execution via CurrentVersion Regist | SecurityEvent.CommandLine contains "\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine has_all "Execute"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine has_all "vbscript"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process has_any "cmd.exe" | [Proxy VBScript Execution via CurrentVersion Registry Key.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Cyborg%20Security%20HUNTER/Hunting%20Queries/Proxy%20VBScript%20Execution%20via%20CurrentVersion%20Registry%20Key.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Rundll32 or cmd Executing Application from Explore | SecurityEvent.CommandLine has "cmd.exe"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine has_any ",.dll"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine has_any "explorer"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine matchesregex "\\/[Cc] +[Ss][Tt][Aa][Rr][Tt].*\\.exe"  \|  SecurityEvent.ParentProcessName has "explorer.exe"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process has_any "wscript.exe" | [Rundll32 or cmd Executing Application from Explorer - Potential Malware Execution Chain.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Cyborg%20Security%20HUNTER/Hunting%20Queries/Rundll32%20or%20cmd%20Executing%20Application%20from%20Explorer%20-%20Potential%20Malware%20Execution%20Chain.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Windows Binaries Executed from Non-Default Directo | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewProcessName has "C:\\Windows\\" | [WindowsBinariesExecutedfromNon-DefaultDirectory.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Analytic%20Rules/WindowsBinariesExecutedfromNon-DefaultDirectory.yaml) |

| hunting_query | Backup Deletion | _Computed.FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe"  \|  _Computed.ProcessCommandLine has "delete"  \|  _Computed.ProcessCommandLine has "delete shadows"  \|  _Computed.ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy delete"  \|  _Computed.ProcessCommandLine has "wbadmin"  \|  _Computed.ProcessCommandLine has "wmic" | [BackupDeletion.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/BackupDeletion.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Certutil (LOLBins and LOLScripts, Normalized Proce | _ASim_ProcessEvent_Create.CommandLine !contains "urlcache"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent_Create.Process has "certutil.exe" | [ASimProcess_CertutilLoLBins.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/ASimProcess_CertutilLoLBins.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Detect Certutil (LOLBins and LOLScripts) Usage | Event.EventID == "1"  \|  Event.Source =~ "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon"  \|  _Computed.Image has "certutil.exe" | [Certutil-LOLBins.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/Certutil-LOLBins.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Download of New File Using Curl | DeviceNetworkEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName has "curl" | [DownloadOfNewFileUsingCurl.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/DownloadOfNewFileUsingCurl.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Execution of File with One Character in the Name | Event.EventID == "1"  \|  Event.EventLog =~ "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" | [FileExecutionWithOneCharacterInTheName.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/FileExecutionWithOneCharacterInTheName.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Persisting via IFEO Registry Key | Event.Source =~ "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon"  \|  WindowsEvent.EventID in "12,13,4657"  \|  _Computed.EventData has_all "\\REGISTRY\\MACHINE"  \|  _Computed.ObjectName !endswith "Image File Execution Options"  \|  _Computed.ObjectName has_all "\\REGISTRY\\MACHINE" | [PersistViaIFEORegistryKey.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/PersistViaIFEORegistryKey.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Potential Microsoft Security Services Tampering | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine has "$true"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine has "/IM"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine has "Set-MpPreference"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine has "Start"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine has "config"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessParentFileName != "cscript.exe"  \|  Event.ParameterXml in "<Param>WinDefend</Param>,<Param>sgrmbroker</Param>"  \|  Event.Source =~ "Microsoft-Windows-SENSE"  \|  WindowsEvent.EventID in "4688,87"  \|  _Computed.CommandLine has "$true"  \|  _Computed.CommandLine has "/IM"  \|  _Computed.CommandLine has "Set-MpPreference"  \|  _Computed.CommandLine has "Start"  \|  _Computed.CommandLine has "config"  \|  _Computed.CommandLine has "start" | [PotentialMicrosoftSecurityServicesTampering.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/PotentialMicrosoftSecurityServicesTampering.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Rare Windows Firewall Rule updates using Netsh | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_all "advfirewall"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "netsh.exe"  \|  Event.Source == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon"  \|  SecurityEvent.AccountType !~ "Machine"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine has_all "advfirewall"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "1"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process =~ "netsh.exe" | [WindowsFirewallUpdateUsingNetsh.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/WindowsFirewallUpdateUsingNetsh.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Remote Login Performed with WMI | SecurityEvent.EventID in "4624,4625" | [RemoteLoginPerformedwithWMI.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/RemoteLoginPerformedwithWMI.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Remote Scheduled Task Creation or Update using ATS | SecurityEvent.EventID == "5145"  \|  SecurityEvent.RelativeTargetName == "atsvc" | [RemoteScheduledTaskCreationUpdateUsingATSVCNamedPipe.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/RemoteScheduledTaskCreationUpdateUsingATSVCNamedPipe.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Rundll32 (LOLBins and LOLScripts) | Event.EventID == "1"  \|  Event.Source =~ "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon"  \|  _Computed.Image has "rundll32.exe" | [SignedBinaryProxyExecutionRundll32.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Endpoint%20Threat%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/SignedBinaryProxyExecutionRundll32.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Certified Pre-Owned - backup of CA private key - r | SecurityEvent.Computer contains "<YOUR CA MACHINE NAME>"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "5059"  \|  _Computed.EventData contains "%%2464"  \|  _Computed.EventData contains "%%2499" | [CertifiedPreOwned-backup-key-2.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/CertifiedPreOwned-backup-key-2.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Component Object Model Hijacking - Vault7 trick | DeviceRegistryEvents.ActionType =~ "RegistryValueSet"  \|  DeviceRegistryEvents.RegistryKey has "ShellFolder"  \|  DeviceRegistryEvents.RegistryValueName =~ "Attributes" | [COMHijacking.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/COMHijacking.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | DCOM Lateral Movement | DeviceProcessEvents.ActionType != "ListeningConnectionCreated"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessParentFileName =~ "svchost.exe" | [DCOMLateralMovement.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/DCOMLateralMovement.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Detecting UAC bypass - ChangePK and SLUI registry  | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "changepk.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessParentFileName =~ "slui.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessIntegrityLevel == "High" | [UACBypass-3-changePK-SLUI-tampering.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/UACBypass-3-changePK-SLUI-tampering.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Detecting UAC bypass - elevated COM interface | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any "E9495B87-D950-4AB5-87A5-FF6D70BF3E90"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "dllhost.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessIntegrityLevel == "High" | [UACBypass-1-elevated-COM.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/UACBypass-1-elevated-COM.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Detecting UAC bypass - modify Windows Store settin | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "wsreset.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessIntegrityLevel == "High" | [UACBypass-2-modify-ms-store.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/UACBypass-2-modify-ms-store.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Disable or Modify Windows Defender | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessVersionInfoProductName !~ "Android Studio" | [DisableOrModifyWindowsDefender.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/DisableOrModifyWindowsDefender.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Excessive share permissions | SecurityEvent.EventID == "5143"  \|  _Computed.DACLS startswith "A;" | [ExcessiveSharePermissions.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/ExcessiveSharePermissions.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Hijack Execution Flow - DLL Side-Loading | DeviceFileEvents.ActionType in "FileCreated,FileModified" | [DLLSideLoading.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/DLLSideLoading.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Ingress Tool Transfer - Certutil | DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "certutil"  \|  _Computed.CleanProcessCommandLine has_any "decode" | [CertutilIngressToolTransfer.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/CertutilIngressToolTransfer.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Microsoft Entra ID UserAgent OS Missmatch | _Computed.DeviceOS in "android,ios"  \|  _Computed.UserAgentOS in "linux,macos,unknown" | [AzureADUserAgentOSmissmatch.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/AzureADUserAgentOSmissmatch.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Office ASR rule triggered from browser spawned off | DeviceEvents.ActionType contains "Office" | [OfficeASRFromBrowser.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/OfficeASRFromBrowser.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Oracle suspicious command execution | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "oracle.exe" | [OracleSuspiciousCommandExecution.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/OracleSuspiciousCommandExecution.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Password Spraying | DeviceLogonEvents.LogonType != "Unlock"  \|  DeviceLogonEvents.RemoteIPType != "Loopback" | [PasswordSprayingWithMDE.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/PasswordSprayingWithMDE.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | SMB/Windows Admin Shares | DeviceProcessEvents.ActionType == "InboundConnectionAccepted"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine !~ "msiexec.exe /V" | [SMBWindowsAdminShares.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/SMBWindowsAdminShares.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Suspicious Process Injection from Office applicati | DeviceEvents.ActionType in "CreateRemoteThreadApiCall,QueueUserApcRemoteApiCall,SetThreadContextRemoteApiCall"  \|  DeviceEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine !contains "/dde"  \|  DeviceEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any ".doc"  \|  DeviceEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any ".docx"  \|  DeviceEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName in~ "excel.exe,powerpnt.exe,winword.exe" | [OfficeProcessInjection.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/OfficeProcessInjection.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Suspicious named pipes | DeviceEvents.ActionType == "NamedPipeEvent" | [SuspiciousNamedPipes.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/SuspiciousNamedPipes.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Trusted Developer Utilities Proxy Execution | DeviceProcessEvents.FolderPath startswith "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName in "WDExpress.exe,devenv.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFolderPath startswith "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has_any "/exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has_any "out" | [TrustedDeveloperUtilitiesProxyExecution.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/FalconFriday/Analytic%20Rules/TrustedDeveloperUtilitiesProxyExecution.yaml) |

| workbook | ForcepointCloudSecuirtyGateway | CommonSecurityLog.Activity != "Blocked"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceProduct in "Email,Web"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Forcepoint CSG"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.LogSeverity in "6,9"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.SourceUserID != "Not available" | [ForcepointCloudSecuirtyGateway.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Forcepoint%20CSG/Workbooks/ForcepointCloudSecuirtyGateway.json) |

### GDPR Compliance & Data Security

| Type | Name | Filter Fields | File |
|------|------|---------------|------|
| workbook | GDPRComplianceAndDataSecurity | AzureDiagnostics.Category == "SQLSecurityAuditEvents"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.ResourceType == "SERVERS/DATABASES"  \|  BehaviorAnalytics.ActivityInsights has "True"  \|  LAQueryLogs.RequestClientApp != "Sentinel-General"  \|  MicrosoftPurviewInformationProtection.LabelName !in "General"  \|  OfficeActivity.ClientInfoString == "Client=Microsoft.Exchange.Powershell; Microsoft WinRM Client"  \|  OfficeActivity.ExternalAccess == "True"  \|  OfficeActivity.Logon_Type != "Owner"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeObjectId has ".exe."  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload in~ "AzureActiveDirectory,MicrosoftTeams"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload has_any "Exchange,OneDrive"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload has_any "OneDrive,SharePoint"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters contains "ForwardTo"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters has "Deleted Items"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters has "Junk Email"  \|  OfficeActivity.RecordType in~ "ExchangeAdmin,SharePointFileOperation"  \|  OfficeActivity.SourceRelativeUrl has "Microsoft Teams Chat Files"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "PII"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "confidential"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "intellectual"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "leak"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "sensitive"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "spill"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "steal"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "theft"  \|  SecurityAlert.Tactics contains "exfil"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName in "Add member to role,Add user,Consent to application,Reset user password,Update user"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName =~ "Sign-in activity"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName != "Consent to application"  \|  _Computed.AdminAuditLogEnabledValue =~ "False"  \|  _Computed.Classification != "[]"  \|  _Computed.EntityType in "amazon-resources,azure-resource,blob,blob-container,gcp-resource,host"  \|  _Computed.NewRole == "2"  \|  _Computed.Operation in~ "New-TransportRule,Set-TransportRule"  \|  _Computed.Operation contains "Forward"  \|  _Computed.SensitivityLabel != "[]"  \|  _Computed.UserName contains "#EXT#"  \|  _Computed.UserName has "#EXT#"  \|  _Computed.scope !contains "openid"  \|  _Computed.scope !in "user_impersonation,User.Read" | [GDPRComplianceAndDataSecurity.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/GDPR%20Compliance%20%26%20Data%20Security/Workbooks/GDPRComplianceAndDataSecurity.json) |

| analytic_rule | GCP Audit Logs - Detect Organization Policy Deleti | GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has_any "OrgPolicy.DeletePolicy"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.ServiceName == "orgpolicy.googleapis.com" | [GCPOrgPolicyDeletion.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Google%20Cloud%20Platform%20Audit%20Logs/Analytic%20Rules/GCPOrgPolicyDeletion.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | GCP Audit Logs - Open Firewall Rule Created or Mod | GCPAuditLogs.GCPResourceType == "gce_firewall_rule"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has "insert"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has "patch"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has_any "firewalls.insert"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.ServiceName == "compute.googleapis.com"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.Severity == "NOTICE"  \|  _Computed.SourceRangeStr in "0.0.0.0,0.0.0.0/0" | [GCPOpenFirewallRuleCreated.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Google%20Cloud%20Platform%20Audit%20Logs/Analytic%20Rules/GCPOpenFirewallRuleCreated.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | GCP Audit Logs - Storage Bucket Made Public | GCPAuditLogs.GCPResourceType == "gcs_bucket"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName == "storage.setIamPermissions"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.ServiceName == "storage.googleapis.com"  \|  _Computed.Action == "ADD"  \|  _Computed.Member in~ "allAuthenticatedUsers,allUsers" | [GCPStorageBucketMadePublic.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Google%20Cloud%20Platform%20Audit%20Logs/Analytic%20Rules/GCPStorageBucketMadePublic.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | GCP Audit Logs - VPC Flow Logs Disabled | GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has "DeleteVpcFlowLogsConfig"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has_any "VpcFlowLogsService.UpdateVpcFlowLogsConfig"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.ServiceName == "networkmanagement.googleapis.com"  \|  _Computed.ConfigState == "DISABLED"  \|  _Computed.PermissionType == "ADMIN_WRITE" | [GCPVpcFlowLogsDisabled.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Google%20Cloud%20Platform%20Audit%20Logs/Analytic%20Rules/GCPVpcFlowLogsDisabled.yaml) |
| hunting_query | GCP Audit Logs - List Activities Disabling Data Ac | GCPAuditLogs.GCPResourceType == "project"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName == "SetIamPolicy"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.ServiceName == "cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"  \|  _Computed.Action == "REMOVE"  \|  _Computed.LogType in "ADMIN_READ,DATA_READ,DATA_WRITE" | [GCPDataAccessLoggingDisabled.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Google%20Cloud%20Platform%20Audit%20Logs/Hunting%20Queries/GCPDataAccessLoggingDisabled.yaml) |
| hunting_query | GCP Audit Logs - List All GCP Firewall Operations  | GCPAuditLogs.GCPResourceType == "gce_firewall_rule"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has "delete"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has "insert"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has "patch"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has "update"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has_any "compute.firewalls.insert"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.ServiceName == "compute.googleapis.com" | [GCPFirewallOperationsByPrincipal.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Google%20Cloud%20Platform%20Audit%20Logs/Hunting%20Queries/GCPFirewallOperationsByPrincipal.yaml) |

| hunting_query | GCP Audit Logs - List GCP Organization Policy Modi | GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has "DeletePolicy"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has "UpdatePolicy"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.MethodName has_any "OrgPolicy.DeletePolicy"  \|  GCPAuditLogs.ServiceName == "orgpolicy.googleapis.com" | [GCPOrgPolicyModificationsByPrincipal.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Google%20Cloud%20Platform%20Audit%20Logs/Hunting%20Queries/GCPOrgPolicyModificationsByPrincipal.yaml) |

### Malware Protection Essentials

| Type | Name | Filter Fields | File |
|------|------|---------------|------|
| analytic_rule | Detect Malicious Usage of Recovery Tools to Delete | _ASim_ProcessEvent.CommandLine has_all "/set"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.CommandLine has_all "delete"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.TargetProcessFilename =~ "bcedit.exe"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.TargetProcessFilename has_any "vssadmin.exe" | [BackupDeletionDetected.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Analytic%20Rules/BackupDeletionDetected.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Detect Print Processors Registry Driver Key Creati | _ASim_RegistryEvent.EventType in "RegistryKeyCreated,RegistryValueSet" | [PrintProcessersModified.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Analytic%20Rules/PrintProcessersModified.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Detect Registry Run Key Creation/Modification | _ASim_RegistryEvent.EventType in "RegistryKeyCreated,RegistryValueSet" | [StartupRegistryModified.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Analytic%20Rules/StartupRegistryModified.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Detect Windows Allow Firewall Rule Addition/Modifi | _ASim_RegistryEvent.EventType in "RegistryKeyCreated,RegistryValueSet"  \|  _ASim_RegistryEvent.RegistryValueData has_all "Action=Allow" | [WindowsAllowFirewallRuleAdded.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Analytic%20Rules/WindowsAllowFirewallRuleAdded.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Detect Windows Update Disabled from Registry | _ASim_RegistryEvent.EventType in "RegistryKeyCreated,RegistryValueSet"  \|  _ASim_RegistryEvent.RegistryValue has_any "AUOptions"  \|  _ASim_RegistryEvent.RegistryValueData == "1" | [WindowsUpdateDisabled.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Analytic%20Rules/WindowsUpdateDisabled.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Process Creation with Suspicious CommandLine Argum | _ASim_ProcessEvent.EventType == "ProcessCreated"  \|  _Computed.CommandLineArgs contains "base64" | [SuspiciousProcessCreation.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Analytic%20Rules/SuspiciousProcessCreation.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Detect File Creation in Startup Folder | _ASim_FileEvent.EventType == "FileCreated" | [FileCretaedInStartupFolder.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/FileCretaedInStartupFolder.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Detect Files with Ramsomware Extensions | _ASim_FileEvent.EventType !in "FileDeleted,DeleteFile" | [FilesWithRansomwareExtensions.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/FilesWithRansomwareExtensions.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Detect Modification to System Files or Directories | _ASim_FileEvent.EventType in "FileCreated,FileModified" | [SystemFilesModifiedByUser.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/SystemFilesModifiedByUser.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Detect New Scheduled Task Creation that Run Execut | _ASim_ProcessEvent.EventType == "ProcessCreated"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.TargetProcessName has "schtasks.exe" | [NewMaliciousScheduledTask.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/NewMaliciousScheduledTask.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Detect New Scheduled Task Entry Creations | _ASim_FileEvent.EventType in "FileCreated,FileModified"  \|  _ASim_FileEvent.FilePath has "\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks" | [NewScheduledTaskCreation.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/NewScheduledTaskCreation.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Executable Files Created in Uncommon Locations | _ASim_FileEvent.EventType == "FileCreated" | [ExecutableInUncommonLocation.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Hunting%20Queries/ExecutableInUncommonLocation.yaml) |
| workbook | MalwareProtectionEssentialsWorkbook | _ASim_ProcessEvent.CommandLine has_all "/set"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.CommandLine has_all "delete"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.EventType in "FileCreated,FileModified,ProcessCreated,RegistryKeyCreated,RegistryValueSet"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.FilePath has "\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.RegistryValue has_any "AUOptions"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.RegistryValueData == "1"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.RegistryValueData has_all "Action=Allow"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.TargetProcessFilename =~ "bcedit.exe"  \|  _ASim_ProcessEvent.TargetProcessFilename has_any "vssadmin.exe"  \|  _Computed.CommandLineArgs contains "base64" | [MalwareProtectionEssentialsWorkbook.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Malware%20Protection%20Essentials/Workbooks/MalwareProtectionEssentialsWorkbook.json) |

### Microsoft 365

| Type | Name | Filter Fields | File |
|------|------|---------------|------|
| analytic_rule | Accessed files shared by temporary external user | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation in "FileAccessed,FileUploaded"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation in~ "MemberAdded,MemberRemoved"  \|  OfficeActivity.RecordType == "SharePointFileOperation"  \|  OfficeActivity.SourceRelativeUrl has "Microsoft Teams Chat Files"  \|  _Computed.MemberAdded contains "#EXT#" | [External User added to Team and immediately uploads file.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/External%20User%20added%20to%20Team%20and%20immediately%20uploads%20file.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Exchange AuditLog Disabled | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation =~ "Set-AdminAuditLogConfig"  \|  OfficeActivity.UserType in~ "Admin,DcAdmin"  \|  _Computed.AdminAuditLogEnabledValue =~ "False" | [exchange_auditlogdisabled.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/exchange_auditlogdisabled.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Exchange workflow MailItemsAccessed operation anom | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation =~ "MailItemsAccessed"  \|  OfficeActivity.ResultStatus =~ "Succeeded" | [MailItemsAccessedTimeSeries.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/MailItemsAccessedTimeSeries.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | External user added and removed in short timeframe | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams" | [ExternalUserAddedRemovedInTeams.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/ExternalUserAddedRemovedInTeams.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Mail redirect via ExO transport rule | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"  \|  _Computed.Operation in~ "New-TransportRule,Set-TransportRule" | [Mail_redirect_via_ExO_transport_rule.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/Mail_redirect_via_ExO_transport_rule.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Malicious Inbox Rule | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation =~ "New-InboxRule"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters has "DeleteMessage"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters has "Deleted Items"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters has "Junk Email"  \|  OfficeActivity.ResultStatus in~ "Succeeded,True" | [Malicious_Inbox_Rule.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/Malicious_Inbox_Rule.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Multiple Teams deleted by a single user | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation =~ "TeamDeleted" | [MultipleTeamsDeletes.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/MultipleTeamsDeletes.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Multiple users email forwarded to same destination | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation in "New-InboxRule,Set-InboxRule,Set-Mailbox"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters has_any "ForwardTo" | [Office_MailForwarding.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/Office_MailForwarding.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | New executable via Office FileUploaded Operation | OfficeActivity.Operation contains "download"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation contains "upload" | [Office_Uploaded_Executables.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/Office_Uploaded_Executables.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Office Policy Tampering | OfficeActivity.ClientIP has "."  \|  OfficeActivity.ClientIP has "["  \|  OfficeActivity.RecordType =~ "ExchangeAdmin"  \|  OfficeActivity.UserType in~ "Admin,DcAdmin" | [office_policytampering.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/office_policytampering.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Office365 Sharepoint File transfer Folders above t | OfficeActivity.EventSource == "SharePoint"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload has_any "OneDrive,SharePoint"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation has_any "FileDownloaded" | [sharepoint_file_transfer_folders_above_threshold.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/sharepoint_file_transfer_folders_above_threshold.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Office365 Sharepoint File transfer above threshold | OfficeActivity.EventSource == "SharePoint"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload has_any "OneDrive,SharePoint"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation has_any "FileDownloaded" | [sharepoint_file_transfer_above_threshold.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/sharepoint_file_transfer_above_threshold.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Rare and potentially high-risk Office operations | OfficeActivity.Operation in~ "Add-MailboxFolderPermission,Add-MailboxPermission,New-InboxRule,New-ManagementRoleAssignment,Set-InboxRule,Set-Mailbox,Set-TransportRule"  \|  OfficeActivity.UserId has_any "NT AUTHORITY\\SYSTEM (Microsoft.Exchange.ServiceHost)" | [RareOfficeOperations.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Analytic%20Rules/RareOfficeOperations.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Anomalous access to other users' mailboxes | OfficeActivity.Operation =~ "MailItemsAccessed"  \|  OfficeActivity.ResultStatus =~ "Succeeded" | [AnomolousUserAccessingOtherUsersMailbox.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/AnomolousUserAccessingOtherUsersMailbox.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Bots added to multiple teams | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation =~ "BotAddedToTeam" | [MultiTeamBot.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/MultiTeamBot.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Exes with double file extension and access summary | OfficeActivity.OfficeObjectId has ".exe."  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation in~ "FileAccessed,FileDownloaded"  \|  OfficeActivity.RecordType =~ "SharePointFileOperation" | [double_file_ext_exes.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/double_file_ext_exes.yaml) |
| hunting_query | External user added and removed in a short timefra | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation in~ "MemberAdded,MemberRemoved"  \|  _Computed.UPN contains "#EXT#" | [ExternalUserAddedRemovedInTeams_HuntVersion.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/ExternalUserAddedRemovedInTeams_HuntVersion.yaml) |
| hunting_query | External user from a new organisation added to Tea | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation =~ "MemberAdded" | [ExternalUserFromNewOrgAddedToTeams.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/ExternalUserFromNewOrgAddedToTeams.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Files uploaded to teams and access summary | OfficeActivity.Operation in~ "FileAccessed,FileDownloaded,FileUploaded"  \|  OfficeActivity.RecordType =~ "SharePointFileOperation"  \|  OfficeActivity.SourceRelativeUrl has "Microsoft Teams Chat Files"  \|  OfficeActivity.UserId != "app@sharepoint" | [TeamsFilesUploaded.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/TeamsFilesUploaded.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Mail redirect via ExO transport rule | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"  \|  _Computed.Operation in~ "New-TransportRule,Set-TransportRule" | [Mail_redirect_via_ExO_transport_rule_hunting.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/Mail_redirect_via_ExO_transport_rule_hunting.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Multiple Teams deleted by a single user | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation =~ "TeamDeleted" | [MultipleTeamsDeletes.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/MultipleTeamsDeletes.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Multiple users email forwarded to same destination | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation in "New-InboxRule,Set-InboxRule,Set-Mailbox"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters has_any "ForwardTo" | [MultipleUsersEmailForwardedToSameDestination.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/MultipleUsersEmailForwardedToSameDestination.yaml) |
| hunting_query | New Admin account activity seen which was not seen | OfficeActivity.RecordType == "ExchangeAdmin"  \|  OfficeActivity.UserType in "Admin,DcAdmin" | [new_adminaccountactivity.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/new_adminaccountactivity.yaml) |
| hunting_query | New Windows Reserved Filenames staged on Office fi | OfficeActivity.UserAgent !has "Mac OS" | [New_WindowsReservedFileNamesOnOfficeFileServices.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/New_WindowsReservedFileNamesOnOfficeFileServices.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Non-owner mailbox login activity | OfficeActivity.Logon_Type != "Owner"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation == "MailboxLogin" | [nonowner_MailboxLogin.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/nonowner_MailboxLogin.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Office Mail Forwarding - Hunting Version | OfficeActivity.ClientIP has "."  \|  OfficeActivity.ClientIP has "["  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters contains "ForwardTo"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters contains "ForwardingSmtpAddress"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters contains "RedirectTo"  \|  _Computed.Operation in~ "New-InboxRule,Set-InboxRule,Set-Mailbox" | [OfficeMailForwarding_hunting.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/OfficeMailForwarding_hunting.yaml) |
| hunting_query | PowerShell or non-browser mailbox login activity | OfficeActivity.ClientInfoString == "Client=Microsoft.Exchange.Powershell; Microsoft WinRM Client"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation == "MailboxLogin" | [powershell_or_nonbrowser_MailboxLogin.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/powershell_or_nonbrowser_MailboxLogin.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Previously unseen bot or application added to Team | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams" | [NewBotAddedToTeams.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/NewBotAddedToTeams.yaml) |
| hunting_query | SharePointFileOperation via clientIP with previous | OfficeActivity.RecordType == "SharePointFileOperation" | [sharepoint_downloads.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/sharepoint_downloads.yaml) |
| hunting_query | SharePointFileOperation via devices with previousl | OfficeActivity.Operation in "FileDownloaded,FileUploaded"  \|  OfficeActivity.RecordType == "SharePointFileOperation" | [new_sharepoint_downloads_by_UserAgent.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/new_sharepoint_downloads_by_UserAgent.yaml) |
| hunting_query | SharePointFileOperation via previously unseen IPs | OfficeActivity.Operation in "FileDownloaded,FileUploaded"  \|  OfficeActivity.RecordType == "SharePointFileOperation" | [new_sharepoint_downloads_by_IP.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/new_sharepoint_downloads_by_IP.yaml) |
| hunting_query | User added to Teams and immediately uploads file | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation in "FileUploaded,MemberAdded"  \|  OfficeActivity.RecordType == "SharePointFileOperation"  \|  OfficeActivity.SourceRelativeUrl has "Microsoft Teams Chat Files" | [UserAddToTeamsAndUploadsFile.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/UserAddToTeamsAndUploadsFile.yaml) |
| hunting_query | User made Owner of multiple teams | OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation =~ "MemberRoleChanged"  \|  _Computed.NewRole == "2" | [MultiTeamOwner.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/MultiTeamOwner.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Windows Reserved Filenames staged on Office file s | OfficeActivity.UserAgent !has "Mac OS" | [WindowsReservedFileNamesOnOfficeFileServices.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Hunting%20Queries/WindowsReservedFileNamesOnOfficeFileServices.yaml) |

| workbook | Office365 | OfficeActivity.ExternalAccess == "True"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload in "Exchange,OneDrive,SharePoint"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation in "FileDownloaded,FileUploaded,MailboxLogin"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation contains "File"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation contains "Folder"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation contains "add"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation contains "create"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation contains "delete"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation contains "group"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation contains "update"  \|  OfficeActivity.Operation contains "user"  \|  OfficeActivity.UserType == "Admin" | [Office365.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20365/Workbooks/Office365.json) |

| analytic_rule | AV detections related to Ukraine threats | SecurityAlert.ProviderName =~ "MDATP" | [AVdetectionsrelatedtoUkrainebasedthreats.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20Defender%20XDR/Analytic%20Rules/AVdetectionsrelatedtoUkrainebasedthreats.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Account Creation | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "net.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine !contains "/add"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine !contains "/domain"  \|  _Computed.CreatedOnLocalMachine == "0" | [Persistence/AccountCreation.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20Defender%20XDR/Analytic%20Rules/Persistence/AccountCreation.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Deimos Component Execution | DeviceEvents.ActionType == "AmsiScriptContent"  \|  DeviceEvents.AdditionalFields endswith "[mArS.deiMos]::inteRaCt()"  \|  DeviceEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "powershell.exe" | [Campaign/Jupyter-Solarmaker/DeimosComponentExecution.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20Defender%20XDR/Analytic%20Rules/Campaign/Jupyter-Solarmaker/DeimosComponentExecution.yaml) |
