| analytic_rule | Detect Potential Kerberoast Activities | IdentityLogonEvents.ActionType == "LogonSuccess"  \|  IdentityLogonEvents.Protocol == "Kerberos"  \|  _Computed.AttackTechniques has "T1558.003" | [Execution/PotentialKerberoastActivities.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20Defender%20XDR/Analytic%20Rules/Execution/PotentialKerberoastActivities.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Detect Suspicious Commands Initiated by Webserver  | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName in "beasvc.exe,httpd.exe,w3wp.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName startswith "tomcat"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessParentFileName in "beasvc.exe,httpd.exe,w3wp.exe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessParentFileName startswith "tomcat"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine contains "%temp%"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "certutil"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "ipconfig"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "ping"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "systeminfo"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "timeout"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "wget"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "whoami" | [Discovery/SuspiciousCommandInitiatedByWebServerProcess.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20Defender%20XDR/Analytic%20Rules/Discovery/SuspiciousCommandInitiatedByWebServerProcess.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Doppelpaymer Stop Services | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName startswith "psexe"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "msexchange"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "sql"  \|  DeviceProcessEvents.ProcessCommandLine has "stop-service" | [Defense Evasion/DoppelpaymerStopService.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20Defender%20XDR/Analytic%20Rules/Defense%20Evasion/DoppelpaymerStopService.yaml) |

| workbook | MicrosoftDefenderForOffice365detectionsandinsights | AlertEvidence.ActionType in "AdminSubmissionSubmitted,AttackSimUserSubmission,ClickBlocked,Malware ZAP,Phish ZAP,Spam ZAP,UserSubmission"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType =~ "Automated Remediation"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType contains "Submission"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType contains "UserSubmission"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType contains "ZAP"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType has "Malware ZAP"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType has "Phish ZAP"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType has "Spam ZAP"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType has "ZAP"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType has_any "ClickAllowed"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType has_any "ClickBlocked"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType has_any "UrlErrorPage"  \|  AlertEvidence.ActionType has_any "UrlScanInProgress"  \|  AlertEvidence.Title startswith "CC_"  \|  CloudAppEvents.ActionType in "AdminSubmissionSubmitted,AttackSimUserSubmission,FileMalwareDetected,Malware ZAP,Phish ZAP,Redelivery,SubmissionNotification,UserSubmission"  \|  CloudAppEvents.ActionType contains "AdminSubmission"  \|  CloudAppEvents.ActionType contains "AdminSubmissionTriage"  \|  CloudAppEvents.ActionType contains "Submission"  \|  CloudAppEvents.ActionType contains "UserSubmission"  \|  CloudAppEvents.ActionType contains "UserSubmissionTriage"  \|  CloudAppEvents.UserAgent =~ "MS Scanner ATP"  \|  EmailEvents.ActionType in "AdminSubmissionSubmitted,Redelivery,Spam ZAP,UserSubmission"  \|  EmailEvents.DeliveryAction == "Delivered"  \|  EmailEvents.DeliveryAction != "Delivered"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelAction in "Allow,Block"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "Phishing simulation"  \|  EmailEvents.OrgLevelPolicy != "SecOps Mailbox"  \|  EmailEvents.UserLevelAction in "Allow,Block"  \|  EmailPostDeliveryEvents.Action == "Quarantine release"  \|  EmailPostDeliveryEvents.ActionResult == "Success"  \|  _Computed.DetectionTechnology contains "Malware"  \|  _Computed.DetectionTechnology contains "Phish"  \|  _Computed.DetectionTechnology contains "Spam"  \|  _Computed.FirstDetection in "Malware,Phish,Spam"  \|  _Computed.FirstSubcategory contains "Malware"  \|  _Computed.FirstSubcategory contains "Phish"  \|  _Computed.FirstSubcategory contains "Spam"  \|  _Computed.Record == "29"  \|  _Computed.SubmissionContentType == "Mail"  \|  _Computed.SubmissionType in "0,1,2,3"  \|  _Computed.lastVerdict in "malicious,suspicious"  \|  _Computed.verdictFromAnalysis in "malicious,suspicious"  \|  _Computed.verdictTI == "malicious" | [MicrosoftDefenderForOffice365detectionsandinsights.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Microsoft%20Defender%20XDR/Workbooks/MicrosoftDefenderForOffice365detectionsandinsights.json) |

\|  BehaviorAnalytics.ActivityType == "LogOn"  \|  EmailEvents.ActionType in "Add member to role,Add user,InteractiveLogon,RemoteInteractiveLogon,Reset user password,ResourceAccess,Sign-in,Update user"  \|  LAQueryLogs.RequestClientApp != "Sentinel-General"  \|  LAQueryLogs.ResponseCode != "200"  \|  LAQueryLogs.ResponseRowCount == "5000"  \|  OfficeActivity.ClientInfoString == "Client=Microsoft.Exchange.Powershell; Microsoft WinRM Client"  \|  OfficeActivity.Logon_Type != "Owner"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeObjectId has ".exe."  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload in~ "AzureActiveDirectory,MicrosoftTeams"  \|  OfficeActivity.OfficeWorkload has_any "Exchange,OneDrive"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters contains "ForwardTo"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters contains "ForwardingSmtpAddress"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters has "Deleted Items"  \|  OfficeActivity.Parameters has "Junk Email"  \|  OfficeActivity.RecordType in~ "ExchangeAdmin,SharePointFileOperation"  \|  OfficeActivity.SourceRelativeUrl has "Microsoft Teams Chat Files"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "PII"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "anomal"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "confidential"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "data"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "fusion"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "intellectual"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "leak"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "sensitive"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "spill"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "steal"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName contains "theft"  \|  SecurityAlert.ProductName == "Microsoft 365 Insider Risk Management"  \|  SecurityAlert.ProviderName contains "anomal"  \|  SecurityAlert.ProviderName contains "fusion"  \|  SecurityAlert.Tactics contains "exfil"  \|  SecurityEvent.ErrorCode == "50126"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID in "4723,4724"  \|  SigninLogs.AppDisplayName contains "Portal"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName in "Add member to role,Add user,Consent to application,Create Deployment,Create or Update Virtual Machine,Create role assignment,List Storage Account Keys,Reset user password,Update user"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName in~ "Set domain authentication,Set federation settings on domain,Sign-in activity"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName != "Consent to application"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName contains "Create"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName contains "Delete"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName contains "Update"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName contains "delet"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName contains "delete"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName contains "remove"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName has "Create"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName has_any "Create,Update"  \|  SigninLogs.OperationName has_any "Ip,Security Rule"  \|  Syslog.Facility in "auth,authpriv"  \|  _Computed.AdminAuditLogEnabledValue =~ "False"  \|  _Computed.IncidentURL !contains "//resourceGroups"  \|  _Computed.NewDomainValue has "Federated"  \|  _Computed.NewRole == "2"  \|  _Computed.Operation in~ "New-InboxRule,New-TransportRule,Set-Mailbox,Set-TransportRule"  \|  _Computed.Operation contains "Forward"  \|  _Computed.ResultText !contains "success"  \|  _Computed.UserName contains "#EXT#"  \|  _Computed.UserName has "#EXT#"  \|  _Computed.scope !contains "openid"  \|  _Computed.scope !in "user_impersonation,User.Read" | [InsiderRiskManagement.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/MicrosoftPurviewInsiderRiskManagement/Workbooks/InsiderRiskManagement.json) |

| analytic_rule | High-Risk Cross-Cloud User Impersonation | AWSCloudTrail.EventName in~ "AddUserToGroup,ChangePassword,CreateAccessKey,CreateGroup,CreateMailUser,CreateOrganization,CreateRole,CreateServiceSpecificCredential,CreateUser,CreateVirtualMFADevice,DeleteAccessKey,DeleteGroup,DeleteGroupPolicy,DeleteLoginProfile,DeleteRole,DeleteServiceSpecificCredential,DeleteUser,DisableMailUsers,EnableMailUsers,RegisterToWorkMail,RemoveUserFromGroup,ResetPassword,SetDefaultMailDomain,SetMailUserDetails,UpdateAccountEmailAddress,UploadServerCertificate"  \|  AWSCloudTrail.EventSource in "iam.amazonaws.com,identitystore.amazonaws.com,workdocs.amazonaws.com,workmail.amazonaws.com"  \|  SigninLogs.AppDisplayName in "ADFS Trust,Azure Portal,Microsoft Azure PowerShell"  \|  SigninLogs.RiskLevelAggregated == "high"  \|  SigninLogs.RiskLevelDuringSignIn == "high" | [UserImpersonateByRiskyUser.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Multi%20Cloud%20Attack%20Coverage%20Essentials%20-%20Resource%20Abuse/Analytic%20Rules/UserImpersonateByRiskyUser.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Successful AWS Console Login from IP Address Obser | AWSCloudTrail.EventName == "ConsoleLogin"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertName in "Multiple failed user log on attempts to an app,Password Spray"  \|  SecurityAlert.ProductName in "Azure Active Directory Identity Protection,Microsoft Cloud App Security" | [SuccessfulAWSConsoleLoginfromIPAddressObservedConductingPasswordSpray.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Multi%20Cloud%20Attack%20Coverage%20Essentials%20-%20Resource%20Abuse/Analytic%20Rules/SuccessfulAWSConsoleLoginfromIPAddressObservedConductingPasswordSpray.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Suspicious AWS console logins by credential access | AWSCloudTrail.EventName == "ConsoleLogin"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertSeverity == "High"  \|  SecurityAlert.ProductName in "Azure Active Directory,Azure Active Directory Identity Protection,Microsoft 365 Defender,Microsoft Cloud App Security,Microsoft Defender ATP,Microsoft Defender Advanced Threat Protection"  \|  SecurityAlert.Tactics in "CredentialAccess,InitialAccess" | [SuspiciousAWSConsolLoginByCredentialAceessAlerts.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Multi%20Cloud%20Attack%20Coverage%20Essentials%20-%20Resource%20Abuse/Analytic%20Rules/SuspiciousAWSConsolLoginByCredentialAceessAlerts.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | User impersonation by Identity Protection alerts | AWSCloudTrail.EventName in~ "AddUserToGroup,ChangePassword,CreateAccessKey,CreateGroup,CreateRole,CreateUser,CreateVirtualMFADevice,DeleteAccessKey,DeleteGroup,DeleteLoginProfile,DeleteRole,DeleteUser,RemoveUserFromGroup"  \|  SecurityAlert.AlertSeverity == "High"  \|  SecurityAlert.ProductName has "Azure Active Directory Identity Protection" | [UserImpersonateByAAID.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Multi%20Cloud%20Attack%20Coverage%20Essentials%20-%20Resource%20Abuse/Analytic%20Rules/UserImpersonateByAAID.yaml) |

in "Succeeded,Success"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationNameValue contains "cluster"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationNameValue contains "insights"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationNameValue contains "storage"  \| contains "DisableLockScreenAppNotifications"  \|  SecurityBaseline.RuleSetting contains "DisablePasswordReveal"  \|  SecurityBaseline.RuleSetting contains "DisableRemovableDriveScanning"  \| "application gateway"  \|  _Computed.RecommendationName contains "auth"  \|  _Computed.RecommendationName contains "avail"  \|  _Computed.RecommendationName contains "cert"  \| contains "internet"  \|  _Computed.RecommendationName contains "least"  \|  _Computed.RecommendationName contains "load"  \|  _Computed.RecommendationName contains "managed key"  \| contains "traffic"  \|  _Computed.Spam in "High,Moderate,Normal"  \|  _Computed.assessmentKey == "1195afff-c881-495e-9bc5-1486211ae03f"  \|  _Computed.complianceControlId == "SC.28.*"  \| SP 800 53 R4"  \|  _Computed.complianceState in "Failed,Passed"  \|  _Computed.resourceSource in~ "aws,gcp"  \|  _Computed.state in "Healthy,NotApplicable,Unhealthy" | | analytic_rule | Palo Alto - possible internal to external port sca | CommonSecurityLog.AdditionalExtensions has "reason=tcp-rst-from-client"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.AdditionalExtensions has "reason=tcp-rst-from-server"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.ApplicationProtocol == "incomplete"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DestinationPort !in "443,53,389,80,0,880,8888,8080"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceAction !in "reset-both,deny"  \|  _Computed.reason !has "aged-out"  \|  _Computed.reason !has "tcp-fin" | [PaloAlto-PortScanning.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/PaloAlto-PAN-OS/Analytic%20Rules/PaloAlto-PortScanning.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Palo Alto - possible nmap scan on with top 100 opt | CommonSecurityLog.DestinationPort in "10000,1025,1026,1027,1028,1029,106,110,111,1110,119,13,135,139,143,1433,144,1720,1723,1755,179,1900,199,2000,2001,2049,21,2121,22,23,25,26,2717,3000,3128,32768,3306,3389,37,389,3986,427,444,445,465,4899,49152,49153,49154,49155,49156,49157,5000,5009,5051,5060,5101,513,514,515,5190,5357,543,5432,544,548,554,5631,5666,5800,587,5900,6000,6001,631,646,6646,7,7070,79,8000,8008,8009,8080,8081,81,8443,873,88,8888,9,9100,990,993,995,9999" | [PaloAlto-Top100_NmapScan.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/PaloAlto-PAN-OS/Analytic%20Rules/PaloAlto-Top100_NmapScan.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Palo Alto - potential beaconing detected | CommonSecurityLog.Activity == "TRAFFIC"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Palo Alto Networks" | [PaloAlto-NetworkBeaconing.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/PaloAlto-PAN-OS/Analytic%20Rules/PaloAlto-NetworkBeaconing.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Palo Alto Threat signatures from Unusual IP addres | CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID in "file,flood,packet,scan,spyware,virus,vulnerability,wildfire,wildfire-virus"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor =~ "Palo Alto Networks" | [PaloAlto-UnusualThreatSignatures.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/PaloAlto-PAN-OS/Analytic%20Rules/PaloAlto-UnusualThreatSignatures.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Palo Alto - high-risk ports | CommonSecurityLog.Activity == "TRAFFIC"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceAction != "deny"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Palo Alto Networks"  \|  _Computed.result == "0" | [PaloAlto-HighRiskPorts.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/PaloAlto-PAN-OS/Hunting%20Queries/PaloAlto-HighRiskPorts.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Palo Alto - potential beaconing detected | CommonSecurityLog.Activity == "TRAFFIC"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Palo Alto Networks" | [Palo Alto - potential beaconing detected.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/PaloAlto-PAN-OS/Hunting%20Queries/Palo%20Alto%20-%20potential%20beaconing%20detected.yaml) |
| workbook | PaloAltoNetworkThreat | CommonSecurityLog.Activity =~ "THREAT"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID in~ "correlation,vulnerability,wildfire"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "file"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "url"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceProduct has "PAN-OS"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor =~ "Palo Alto Networks" | [PaloAltoNetworkThreat.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/PaloAlto-PAN-OS/Workbooks/PaloAltoNetworkThreat.json) |
| workbook | PaloAltoOverview | CommonSecurityLog.Activity in~ "THREAT,TRAFFIC,Traffic"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceAction in "alert,block-continue,block-url,continue"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceAction !contains "block"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceAction !contains "deny"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceAction contains "block"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceAction contains "deny"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID in~ "end,file,url,wildfire"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceProduct has "LF"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceProduct has "PAN-OS"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor =~ "Palo Alto Networks" | [PaloAltoOverview.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/PaloAlto-PAN-OS/Workbooks/PaloAltoOverview.json) |

| workbook | SonicWallFirewall | ASimWebSessionSonicWallFirewall.DstIpAddr !has ".255"  \|  ASimWebSessionSonicWallFirewall.DstZone == "WAN"  \|  ASimWebSessionSonicWallFirewall.EventMessage in "Application Control Detection Alert,Application Control Prevention Alert,Website Blocked"  \|  ASimWebSessionSonicWallFirewall.EventOriginalType in "1154,1155,1198,1199,1200,1201,14,1462,1474,1475,1476,1477,1518,1519,1552,1554,1631,177,178,179,200,243,245,30,32,33,608,609,745,789,790,794,795,797,798,799,809,82,83"  \|  ASimWebSessionSonicWallFirewall.EventResult == "Failure"  \|  ASimWebSessionSonicWallFirewall.NetworkDirection in "Inbound,Outbound"  \|  ASimWebSessionSonicWallFirewall.SrcZone == "WAN"  \|  ASimWebSessionSonicWallFirewall.SrcZone != "WAN"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.Activity in "Anti-Spyware Detection Alert,Anti-Spyware Prevention Alert,Application Control Detection Alert,Application Control Prevention Alert,IPS Detection Alert,IPS Prevention Alert,Website Blocked"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.Computer != "127.0.0.1"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "SonicWall"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.Protocol !contains "/"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.Protocol contains "-"  \|  _Computed.Domain contains "."  \|  _Computed.DstZone in "MULTICAST,WAN"  \|  _Computed.DstZone != "WAN"  \|  _Computed.LogMsgSeverity == "Alert (1)"  \|  _Computed.SrcZone in "VPN,WAN"  \|  _Computed.ipspri in "1,2,3"  \|  _Computed.spypri in "1,2,3" | [SonicWallFirewall.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/SonicWall%20Firewall/Workbooks/SonicWallFirewall.json) |

| analytic_rule | Application Gateway WAF - SQLi Detection | AzureDiagnostics.Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.action_s in "Blocked,Matched" | [AzureWAF/AppGwWAF-SQLiDetection.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Detections/Analytic%20Rules/AzureWAF/AppGwWAF-SQLiDetection.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Audit policy manipulation using auditpol utility | DeviceProcessEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "auditpol.exe"  \|  Event.Source == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon"  \|  SecurityEvent.AccountType !~ "Machine"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "1"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process =~ "auditpol.exe"  \|  _Computed.Toggle !in~ "/failure:disable,/success:enable /failure:disable" | [MultipleDataSources/AuditPolicyManipulation_using_auditpol.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Detections/Analytic%20Rules/MultipleDataSources/AuditPolicyManipulation_using_auditpol.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Azure Diagnostic settings removed from a resource | AzureActivity.ActivityStatusValue has_any "Success"  \|  AzureActivity.Caller has "@"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationNameValue =~ "MICROSOFT.INSIGHTS/DIAGNOSTICSETTINGS/DELETE"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationNameValue !~ "MICROSOFT.INSIGHTS/DIAGNOSTICSETTINGS/DELETE"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationNameValue endswith "/DELETE" | [AzureActivity/AzDiagSettingsDeleted.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Detections/Analytic%20Rules/AzureActivity/AzDiagSettingsDeleted.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | COM Event System Loading New DLL | Event.EventID in "1,7"  \|  Event.Source =~ "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon"  \|  _Computed.Image endswith "\\svchost.exe"  \|  _Computed.ParentCommandLine has_all "-k LocalService"  \|  _Computed.ParentImage endswith "\\svchost.exe" | [SecurityEvent/COMEventSystemLoadingNewDLL.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Detections/Analytic%20Rules/SecurityEvent/COMEventSystemLoadingNewDLL.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Failed host logons but success logon to AzureAD | Syslog.Facility contains "auth"  \|  Syslog.ProcessName != "sudo"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "from"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has_any "Accepted,Disconnected,Disconnecting,[preauth],disconnect"  \|  WindowsEvent.EventID == "4625" | [MultipleDataSources/HostAADCorrelation.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Detections/Analytic%20Rules/MultipleDataSources/HostAADCorrelation.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Fortinet - Beacon pattern detected | CommonSecurityLog.DestinationPort != "161"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceAction !in "close,client-rst,server-rst,deny"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Fortinet"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.SourceIP != "0.0.0.0" | [CommonSecurityLog/Fortinet-NetworkBeaconPattern.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Detections/Analytic%20Rules/CommonSecurityLog/Fortinet-NetworkBeaconPattern.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Gain Code Execution on ADFS Server via Remote WMI  | Event.Source == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon"  \|  WindowsEvent.EventID in "1,19,20,21,4624,4688"  \|  _Computed.Account !endswith "$"  \|  _Computed.CommandLine has_any "rundll32"  \|  _Computed.EventData has "wmiprvse.exe"  \|  _Computed.EventData has_any "rundll32"  \|  _Computed.LogonType == "3"  \|  _Computed.ParentProcessName has "wmiprvse.exe" | [MultipleDataSources/GainCodeExecutionADFSviaWMI.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Detections/Analytic%20Rules/MultipleDataSources/GainCodeExecutionADFSviaWMI.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Silk Typhoon Suspicious UM Service Error | Event.EventLevelName =~ "error"  \|  Event.EventLog =~ "Application"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription !contains "System.OutOfMemoryException"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription contains "MSExchange Unified Messaging"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription contains "TextFormattingRunProperties"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription contains "umworkerprocess"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription startswith "An unhandled exception occurred in a UM worker process"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription startswith "The Microsoft Exchange Unified Messaging service"  \|  Event.RenderedDescription startswith "Watson report"  \|  Event.Source startswith "MSExchange" | [SecurityEvent/SilkTyphoonSuspiciousUMServiceError.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Detections/Analytic%20Rules/SecurityEvent/SilkTyphoonSuspiciousUMServiceError.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Failed logon attempts in authpriv | Syslog.Facility =~ "authpriv"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "authentication failure"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "uid=0"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "user unknown" | [FailedLogonAttempts_UnknownUser.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Syslog/Analytic%20Rules/FailedLogonAttempts_UnknownUser.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | SFTP File transfer above threshold | Syslog.ProcessName has "sftp"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "bytes read"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "close"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "session opened for" | [sftp_file_transfer_above_threshold.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Syslog/Analytic%20Rules/sftp_file_transfer_above_threshold.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | SFTP File transfer folder count above threshold | Syslog.ProcessName has "sftp"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "bytes read"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "close"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage has "session opened for" | [sftp_file_transfer_folders_above_threshold.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Syslog/Analytic%20Rules/sftp_file_transfer_folders_above_threshold.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | SSH - Potential Brute Force | Syslog.ProcessName =~ "sshd"  \|  Syslog.SyslogMessage contains "Failed password for invalid user" | [ssh_potentialBruteForce.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Syslog/Analytic%20Rules/ssh_potentialBruteForce.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Squid proxy events related to mining pools | Syslog.ProcessName contains "squid" | [squid_cryptomining_pools.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Syslog/Analytic%20Rules/squid_cryptomining_pools.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Editing Linux scheduled tasks through Crontab | Syslog.Facility =~ "cron"  \|  Syslog.ProcessName =~ "crontab"  \|  Syslog.SeverityLevel =~ "info" | [SchedTaskEditViaCrontab.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Syslog/Hunting%20Queries/SchedTaskEditViaCrontab.yaml) |

| hunting_query | SCX Execute RunAs Providers | Syslog.SyslogMessage has "AUOMS_EXECVE" | [SCXExecuteRunAsProviders.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Syslog/Hunting%20Queries/SCXExecuteRunAsProviders.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Vectra AI Detect - Detections with High Severity | CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "asc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "audit"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "campaigns"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "health"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "hsc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceProduct == "X Series"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Vectra Networks" | [VectraDetect-HighSeverityDetection-by-Tactics.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Vectra%20AI%20Detect/Analytic%20Rules/VectraDetect-HighSeverityDetection-by-Tactics.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Vectra AI Detect - Suspected Compromised Account | CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID == "asc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceProduct == "X Series"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Vectra Networks" | [VectraDetect-Account-by-Severity.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Vectra%20AI%20Detect/Analytic%20Rules/VectraDetect-Account-by-Severity.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Vectra AI Detect - Suspicious Behaviors by Categor | CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "asc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "audit"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "campaigns"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "health"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "hsc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceProduct == "X Series"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Vectra Networks" | [VectraDetect-Suspected-Behavior-by-Tactics.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Vectra%20AI%20Detect/Analytic%20Rules/VectraDetect-Suspected-Behavior-by-Tactics.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Vectra Account's Behaviors | CommonSecurityLog.AdditionalExtensions contains "account"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "asc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "audit"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "campaigns"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "health"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "hsc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceProduct == "X Series"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Vectra Networks" | [VectraDetect-Account-Detections.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Vectra%20AI%20Detect/Analytic%20Rules/VectraDetect-Account-Detections.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Vectra Host's Behaviors | CommonSecurityLog.AdditionalExtensions !has "account"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "asc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "audit"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "campaigns"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "health"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID != "hsc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceProduct == "X Series"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Vectra Networks" | [VectraDetect-Host-Detections.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Vectra%20AI%20Detect/Analytic%20Rules/VectraDetect-Host-Detections.yaml) |
| workbook | AIVectraDetectWorkbook | CommonSecurityLog.DeviceCustomString1 == "True"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceCustomString2 == "True"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID in "asc,audit,campaigns,health,hsc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID !in "health,audit,campaigns,hsc,asc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceEventClassID !in~ "health,audit,campaigns,hsc,asc"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Vectra Networks"  \|  CommonSecurityLog.SourceUserName != "All"  \|  _Computed.outcome != "All"  \|  _Computed.reason != "All"  \|  _Computed.status != "True"  \|  _Computed.status != "pass" | [AIVectraDetectWorkbook.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Vectra%20AI%20Detect/Workbooks/AIVectraDetectWorkbook.json) |

### Web Shells Threat Protection

| Type | Name | Filter Fields | File |
|------|------|---------------|------|
| analytic_rule | Identify SysAid Server web shell creation | SecurityEvent.AccessMask in "0x10,0x100,0x2,0x4"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine has "SysAidServer"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID in "4663,4688"  \|  SecurityEvent.ObjectName endswith ".jsp"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process has_any "java.exe" | [PotentialMercury_Webshell.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Web%20Shells%20Threat%20Protection/Analytic%20Rules/PotentialMercury_Webshell.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | SUPERNOVA webshell | W3CIISLog.csMethod == "GET"  \|  W3CIISLog.csUriQuery contains "args"  \|  W3CIISLog.csUriQuery contains "clazz"  \|  W3CIISLog.csUriQuery contains "codes"  \|  W3CIISLog.csUriQuery contains "method"  \|  W3CIISLog.csUriStem contains "logoimagehandler.ashx" | [Supernovawebshell.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Web%20Shells%20Threat%20Protection/Analytic%20Rules/Supernovawebshell.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Exchange IIS Worker Dropping Webshells | DeviceFileEvents.FolderPath !endswith ".ini"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.FolderPath !endswith ".js"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.FolderPath !endswith ".json"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.FolderPath !endswith ".log"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.FolderPath !endswith ".tmp"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.FolderPath !endswith ".vb"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.FolderPath !endswith ".xml"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.FolderPath has_any "\\wwwroot\\"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.InitiatingProcessCommandLine contains "MSExchange"  \|  DeviceFileEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName == "w3wp.exe" | [exchange-iis-worker-dropping-webshell.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Web%20Shells%20Threat%20Protection/Hunting%20Queries/exchange-iis-worker-dropping-webshell.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Possible Webshell usage attempt related to SpringS | AzureDiagnostics.Category in "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog,ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog,FrontdoorAccessLog,FrontdoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"  \|  _Computed.httpMethod_s =~ "GET" | [SpringshellWebshellUsage.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Web%20Shells%20Threat%20Protection/Hunting%20Queries/SpringshellWebshellUsage.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Possible webshell drop | DeviceFileEvents.ActionType in "FileCreated,FileModified,FileRenamed" | [Possible webshell drop.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Web%20Shells%20Threat%20Protection/Hunting%20Queries/Possible%20webshell%20drop.yaml) |
| hunting_query | UMWorkerProcess Creating Webshell | DeviceFileEvents.InitiatingProcessFileName == "UMWorkerProcess.exe" | [umworkerprocess-creating-webshell.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Web%20Shells%20Threat%20Protection/Hunting%20Queries/umworkerprocess-creating-webshell.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Webshell Detection | W3CIISLog.csMethod == "GET"  \|  W3CIISLog.csReferer has "whoami"  \|  W3CIISLog.csUriQuery has "whoami"  \|  W3CIISLog.csUriStem has "whoami" | [PotentialWebshell.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Web%20Shells%20Threat%20Protection/Hunting%20Queries/PotentialWebshell.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Excessive Windows Logon Failures | SecurityEvent.AccountType =~ "User"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "4625"  \|  _Computed.SubStatus in~ "0xC000005E,0xC0000064,0xC000006A,0xC000006D,0xC000006E,0xC000006F,0xC0000070,0xC0000071,0xC0000072,0xC00000DC,0xC0000133,0xC000015B,0xC000018C,0xC0000192,0xC0000193,0xC0000224,0xC0000225,0xC0000234,0xC00002EE,0xC0000413" | [ExcessiveLogonFailures.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Analytic%20Rules/ExcessiveLogonFailures.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | Gain Code Execution on ADFS Server via SMB + Remot | SecurityEvent.Account !endswith "$"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID in "4624,4688,4697,4698,4699,4700,4701,4702,5145"  \|  SecurityEvent.LogonType == "3"  \|  SecurityEvent.RelativeTargetName in~ "atsvc,svcctl" | [GainCodeExecutionADFSViaSMB.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Analytic%20Rules/GainCodeExecutionADFSViaSMB.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | Microsoft Entra ID Local Device Join Information a | SecurityEvent.EventID in "4656,4663"  \|  _Computed.ObjectType == "Key"  \|  _Computed.SubjectLogonId != "0x3e7" | [LocalDeviceJoinInfoAndTransportKeyRegKeysAccess.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Analytic%20Rules/LocalDeviceJoinInfoAndTransportKeyRegKeysAccess.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | NRT Base64 Encoded Windows Process Command-lines | SecurityEvent.CommandLine contains "TVqQAAMAAAAEAAA"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688" | [NRT_base64_encoded_pefile.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Analytic%20Rules/NRT_base64_encoded_pefile.yaml) |

| analytic_rule | New EXE deployed via Default Domain or Default Dom | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewProcessName has_any "Policies\\{6AC1786C-016F-11D2-945F-00C04fB984F9}" | [NewEXEdeployedviaDefaultDomainorDefaultDomainControllerPolicies.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Analytic%20Rules/NewEXEdeployedviaDefaultDomainorDefaultDomainControllerPolicies.yaml) |

| hunting_query | PowerShell downloads | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688" | [powershell_downloads.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/powershell_downloads.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Powercat Download | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688"  \|  SecurityEvent.Process has_any "cmd.exe" | [PowerCatDownload.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/PowerCatDownload.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Rare Process Path | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688" | [RareProcessPath.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/RareProcessPath.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Rare Processes Run by Service Accounts | SecurityEvent.EventID in "4624,4688" | [RareProcbyServiceAccount.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/RareProcbyServiceAccount.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Remote Task Creation/Update using Schtasks Process | SecurityEvent.CommandLine has "/s"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688"  \|  SecurityEvent.NewProcessName == "C:\\Windows\\System32\\schtasks.exe" | [RemoteScheduledTaskCreationUpdateviaSchtasks.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/RemoteScheduledTaskCreationUpdateviaSchtasks.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Service installation from user writable directory | Event.EventID == "7045"  \|  Event.Source == "Service Control Manager" | [ServiceInstallationFromUsersWritableDirectory.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/ServiceInstallationFromUsersWritableDirectory.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Summary of failed user logons by reason of failure | SecurityEvent.AccountType == "User"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "4625"  \|  _Computed.SubStatus in "0xc000005e,0xc0000062,0xc0000064,0xc000006a,0xc000006d,0xc000006f,0xc0000070,0xc0000071,0xc0000072,0xc0000133,0xc000015b,0xc0000193,0xc0000224,0xc0000234" | [FailedUserLogons.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/FailedUserLogons.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Summary of user logons by logon type | SecurityEvent.AccountType == "User"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID in "4624,4625" | [User Logons By Logon Type.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/User%20Logons%20By%20Logon%20Type.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Summary of users created using uncommon/undocument | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688"  \|  _Computed.CreatedOnLocalMachine == "0" | [persistence_create_account.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/persistence_create_account.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Suspected LSASS Dump | SecurityEvent.CommandLine has_all "procdump"  \|  SecurityEvent.CommandLine has_all "rundll32"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688" | [SuspectedLSASSDump.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/SuspectedLSASSDump.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Suspicious Enumeration using Adfind Tool | SecurityEvent.CommandLine matchesregex "(.*)>(.*)"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688" | [Suspicious_enumeration_using_adfind.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/Suspicious_enumeration_using_adfind.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Suspicious Windows Login Outside Normal Hours | SecurityEvent.EventID in "4624,4625"  \|  SecurityEvent.TargetDomainName !in "Window Manager,Font Driver Host" | [Suspicious_Windows_Login_outside_normal_hours.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/Suspicious_Windows_Login_outside_normal_hours.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Suspicious command line tokens in LolBins or LolSc | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688"  \|  SecurityEvent.SubjectUserName != "SYSTEM"  \|  SecurityEvent.SubjectUserName !endswith "$" | [SuspiciousCommandlineTokenLolbas.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/SuspiciousCommandlineTokenLolbas.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Uncommon processes - bottom 5% | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4688" | [uncommon_processes.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/uncommon_processes.yaml) |
| hunting_query | User Account added to Built in Sensitive or Privil | SecurityEvent.AccountType == "User"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID in "4728,4732,4756"  \|  SecurityEvent.TargetSid !in "S-1-5-32-555" | [UserAccountAddedToPrivlegeGroup.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/UserAccountAddedToPrivlegeGroup.yaml) |
| hunting_query | User account added or removed from a security grou | SecurityEvent.EventID in "4728,4729,4732,4733,4746,4747,4751,4752,4756,4757,4761,4762" | [UserAdd_RemToGroupByUnauthorizedUser.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/UserAdd_RemToGroupByUnauthorizedUser.yaml) |
| hunting_query | User created by unauthorized user | SecurityEvent.AccountType == "User"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "4720" | [UserCreatedByUnauthorizedUser.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/UserCreatedByUnauthorizedUser.yaml) |
| hunting_query | VIP account more than 6 failed logons in 10 | SecurityEvent.AccountType == "User"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "4625"  \|  _Computed.Status in~ "0x80090302,0x80090308,0x8009030E,0xC0000008,0xC0000017,0xC0000022,0xC0000034,0xC000005E,0xC000006A,0xC000006D,0xC000006E,0xC0000073,0xC000009A,0xC00000DC,0xC00000FE,0xC0000106,0xC000010B,0xC000015B,0xC000018B,0xC0000224,0xC0000234,0xC00002EE"  \|  _Computed.SubStatus in~ "0x80090325,0xC0000008,0xC0000022,0xC0000064,0xC000006A,0xC000006D,0xC000006E,0xC000006F,0xC0000070,0xC0000071,0xC0000072,0xC0000073,0xC00000DC,0xC0000133,0xC000018D,0xC0000193,0xC0000380,0xC0000381,0xC0000382,0xC0000383,0xC0000384,0xC0000385,0xC0000386,0xC0000387,0xC0000388,0xC0000389" | [CustomUserList_FailedLogons.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/CustomUserList_FailedLogons.yaml) |
| hunting_query | VIP account more than 6 failed logons in 10 | SecurityEvent.AccountType == "User"  \|  SecurityEvent.EventID == "4625"  \|  SecurityEvent.LogonType in "2,3" | [VIPAccountFailedLogons.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/VIPAccountFailedLogons.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Windows System Shutdown/Reboot(Sysmon) | Event.EventID == "1"  \|  Event.EventLog has "shutdown.exe"  \|  Event.Source == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" | [WindowsSystemShutdownReboot.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/WindowsSystemShutdownReboot.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Windows System Time changed on hosts | SecurityEvent.EventID == "4616" | [WindowsSystemTimeChange.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Hunting%20Queries/WindowsSystemTimeChange.yaml) |
| workbook | EventAnalyzer | SecurityEvent.EventID in "4656,4657,4658,4660,4661,4663,4664,4670,4671,4673,4674,4690,4691,4698,4699,4700,4701,4702,4715,4719,4817,4902,4904,4905,4906,4907,4908,4912,4985,5031,5039,5051,5140,5142,5143,5144,5148,5149,5150,5151,5154,5155,5156,5157,5158,5159,5168,5888,5889,5890" | [EventAnalyzer.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Workbooks/EventAnalyzer.json) |
| workbook | IdentityAndAccess | SecurityEvent.Process != "-" | [IdentityAndAccess.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Security%20Events/Workbooks/IdentityAndAccess.json) |

| hunting_query | DNS - domain anomalous lookup increase | DnsEvents.SubType =~ "LookupQuery"  \|  _Computed.DayNumberofWeek in "1.00:00:00,2.00:00:00,3.00:00:00,4.00:00:00,5.00:00:00,6.00:00:00" | [DNS_DomainAnomalousLookupIncrease.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Server%20DNS/Hunting%20Queries/DNS_DomainAnomalousLookupIncrease.yaml) |
| hunting_query | DNS Full Name anomalous lookup increase | DnsEvents.SubType =~ "LookupQuery"  \|  _Computed.DayNumberofWeek in "1.00:00:00,2.00:00:00,3.00:00:00,4.00:00:00,5.00:00:00,6.00:00:00" | [DNS_FullNameAnomalousLookupIncrease.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Server%20DNS/Hunting%20Queries/DNS_FullNameAnomalousLookupIncrease.yaml) |
| hunting_query | Solorigate DNS Pattern | DnsEvents.IPAddresses != "127.0.0.1"  \|  _Computed.sub_domain !contains "-" | [Solorigate-DNS-Pattern.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Server%20DNS/Hunting%20Queries/Solorigate-DNS-Pattern.yaml) |
| workbook | Dns | _Computed.QueryType in "A,AAAA,ANY,CNAME,MX,NS,PTR,SIG,SOA,SRV,TXT"  \|  _Computed.ResultCode in "0,1,10,16,17,18,19,2,20,21,22,23,3,4,5,6,7,8,9" | [Dns.json](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/Windows%20Server%20DNS/Workbooks/Dns.json) |

"behavior"  \|  AlertEvidence.Title contains "data"  \|  AlertEvidence.Title contains "deception"  \|  AlertEvidence.Title contains "denial"  \|  AlertEvidence.Title contains "detonation"  \| AzureActivity.ActivityStatusValue in "Succeeded,Success"  \|  AzureActivity.OperationNameValue startswith "Microsoft.Logic"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.Category in "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog,AzureFirewallApplicationRule,AzureFirewallDnsProxy,AzureFirewallNetworkRule,DDoSMitigationReports,FrontdoorWebApplicationFirewallLog,NetworkSecurityGroupEvent,WebApplicationFirewallLogs,kube-audit"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.Category contains "SQL"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.Resource == "SOC-NS-AG-WAFV2"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.KEYVAULT"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.ResourceType in Url"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.msg_s !has "No rule matched"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.msg_s !has "Reason:"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.msg_s !has "Rule Collection"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.msg_s !has "TLS extension was missing"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.msg_s !has "Url"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.msg_s !has "Web Category:"  \|  AzureDiagnostics.msg_s has ". | analytic_rule | [Entra ID] Application Assigned Administrator Perm | AuditLogs.AADOperationType =~ "Assign"  \|  AuditLogs.LoggedByService =~ "Core Directory"  \|  AuditLogs.OperationName =~ "Add app role assignment to service principal"  \|  _Computed.PermissionGrant has "RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory"  \|  _Computed.RoleAssignment contains "Admin" | [[Entra ID] Application Assigned Administrator Permissions Immediately After Obtaining Role Management Permissions.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/eDCRule/Analytic%20Rules/%5BEntra%20ID%5D%20Application%20Assigned%20Administrator%20Permissions%20Immediately%20After%20Obtaining%20Role%20Management%20Permissions.yaml) |
| analytic_rule | [Entra ID] Application Granted Administrative Perm | AuditLogs.LoggedByService =~ "Core Directory"  \|  AuditLogs.OperationName in~ "Add app role assignment to service principal,Add delegated permission grant"  \|  _Computed.DisplayName in~ "AppRole.Value,DelegatedPermissionGrant.Scope,ServicePrincipal.DisplayName,ServicePrincipal.ObjectID"  \|  _Computed.PermissionGrant has "RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory" | [[Entra ID] Application Granted Administrative Permission to Assign Microsoft Entra ID Roles.yaml](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/master/Solutions/eDCRule/Analytic%20Rules/%5BEntra%20ID%5D%20Application%20Granted%20Administrative%20Permission%20to%20Assign%20Microsoft%20Entra%20ID%20Roles.yaml) |
